title: selago witbergensis
intro: Selago witbergensis, also known as Witberg's selaginella or Witberg's spike moss, is a rare and endangered plant species belonging to the family Selaginellaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and infections. The health benefits of Selago witbergensis include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or topical creams, which are often used to treat various skin conditions and promote overall well-being.
